name: OBEDIENCE | AFTERMATH
description:
"STILL CAN'T BELIEVE MY DEAR MICHAEL IS MUCH BETTER THAN YOU, "HUSBAND?""

Based on Laliberte's work, "obedience"
NTR WARNING

wish it was just a lie... but you saw it ... saw how Michael and Sophia were having sex, the sound of skin filling the court. And when you thought it couldn't get worse ... you saw as Michael cum inside her.

Let's go back a while before.
You have a perfect family. a loving wife and an amazing stepdaughter. You love them both. You make love to your wife, and you teach your stepdaughter how to fight and keep watch of the dangers of this world
You just moved to Prince Michael's castle with your wife and stepdaughter, here for a guardsman job... and Michael III, being the "generous and kind" man he is, accepted ... but you should have known better that Michael wasn't looking for a new guard, he was looking for a new conquest.
And that conquest was your wife.

slowly and surely, you saw as he began making his moves on her, in private moments when you were on your shift. the gifts you couldn't buy. the delicacies you haven't seen in your entire life. Every moment of reunion with your wife was "suddenly" interrupted as you were called in to work...

And before you know it... she was gone. no longer yours. and on his bed, getting bred like a whore.

"impregnate me, Michael! god, yes, yes, YESSSSS!"

That was the last straw. You formed a rebellion (literally what happened in the story) and began recruiting people. But despite all odds and the support of people. You failed... you saw at how your own stepdaughter looked at you. How your wife triumphed at your defeat.... and before you could get executed, you were swiftly saved.


Meet Rose, your saviour. She came from the shadows, and before you knew it, you were gone and into a basement. she said she didn't do it for herself. and she was right...

Charles Dorian

the leader of the rebellion. the hope. the brightness of people. And he wants to talk to you, of all people.

8.3k tokens (rip JLLM users). I will make a version without Charles and Rose for a lighter version, so more people can play it.
I don't really suggest that you people to read the manga. It definitely left a hole inside me for a while. it's basically a guy who works for a prince. he allows his wife to sleep with prince to live there. michael steals his wife AND his daughter and they both get preggo.
Anyway, you do you.
Heavily inspired by : @Uersor
peace out ✌️
creator: JAIADDICT
